metadata.title: Distributed AI Inference Network Comparison
metadata.task: Distributed AI Inference Network Comparison (2,000 WATT)

networks.name: Akash Network
networks.architecture: Reverse auction marketplace on Cosmos SDK. Providers bid on SDL-defined workloads. Tenants set max price, providers compete.
networks.supported_models: Any containerized model. Llama, Mistral, Stable Diffusion, custom models.
networks.staking_details: AKT staking for provider verification and governance. ~20-30% APY.
networks.key_strengths: Most mature DePIN compute; lowest prices via reverse auction; Cosmos IBC interoperability; strong community governance
networks.key_limitations: No native inference API; variable GPU availability; no optimized routing; deployment complexity for non-experts
networks.wattcoin_relevance: Best candidate for lowest-cost routing; WATT could be accepted via IBC integration

networks.name: Nosana
networks.architecture: Solana-based GPU marketplace with deploy UI. Users choose from 20+ AI compute templates. $NOS for staking and payments.
networks.supported_models: 20+ ready-made templates for inference, training, generation
networks.staking_details: NOS staking via xNOS scoring system. 13,544 stakers, ~$3.78M staked. Governance and rewards.
networks.key_strengths: Consumer-friendly deploy UX; Solana speed/cost; strong community; template library; free credits
networks.key_limitations: Relatively new marketplace; smaller GPU pool; Solana-dependent
networks.wattcoin_relevance: Strong partner candidate for Solana ecosystem; WATT-NOS liquidity pair potential

networks.name: Ritual
networks.architecture: Purpose-built chain for autonomous AI agents. Native compute, TEE-based privacy, verification, coordination. Infernet node network handles inference.
networks.supported_models: Any model compatible with TEE environment
networks.staking_details: Operator staking required to run infernet nodes (planned)
networks.key_strengths: Agent-native architecture; TEE privacy; on-chain verification; research-driven design
networks.key_limitations: Still in development/testnet; limited GPU availability; unproven at scale; complex for simple inference
networks.wattcoin_relevance: Complementary — Ritual provides agent infrastructure, WattCoin provides agent economy layer

networks.name: Hyperbolic
networks.architecture: Centralized AI cloud aggregator. Aggregates GPU supply from multiple data centers. On-demand clusters, serverless inference, reserved clusters.
networks.supported_models: 25+ open-source models via serverless (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek, etc.)
networks.staking_details: No staking. Fiat/credit card/crypto (USDC, USDT, DAI) payments.
networks.key_strengths: Low prices ($0.16/hr entry); fast deployment; OpenAI-compatible API; transparent pricing; multi-provider access
networks.key_limitations: Centralized; no token incentives; newer platform; multi-tenant only for on-demand
networks.wattcoin_relevance: Best centralized API for agent inference; WATT integration via API layer

networks.name: Together AI
networks.architecture: Centralized AI inference and GPU cloud. Serverless API with 200+ models, dedicated endpoints, GPU clusters, fine-tuning.
networks.supported_models: 200+ models: DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen, Gemma, MiniMax, FLUX, Stable Diffusion, Sora, Google Veo, etc.
networks.key_strengths: Largest model catalog; caching discounts; OpenAI-compatible API; fine-tuning; multi-modal (text, image, video, audio)
networks.key_limitations: Fully centralized; most expensive per-token; no crypto/token ecosystem
networks.wattcoin_relevance: Premium inference tier; best for quality-sensitive agent tasks

networks.name: RunPod
networks.architecture: GPU cloud platform with dedicated pods (instances), serverless inference, multi-node clusters. 30+ regions globally. Per-second billing.
networks.supported_models: Any containerized model. Serverless supports popular open-source models.
networks.key_strengths: Largest GPU selection; per-second billing; 30+ regions; good dev experience; both serverless and dedicated
networks.key_limitations: More expensive than decentralized; centralized; no token incentives; no native model zoo
networks.wattcoin_relevance: Broad GPU availability for diverse agent workloads

networks.name: Spheron
networks.architecture: Decentralized GPU marketplace aggregating supply from certified Tier 3/4 data centers. On-demand spot and reserved capacity via single dashboard.
networks.staking_details: SPN staking planned for governance and network security. Currently payments in stablecoins.
networks.key_strengths: Competitive H100 pricing; broad GPU selection (50+ models); multi-cloud aggregation; per-minute billing; enterprise SLA
networks.key_limitations: Less decentralized than P2P; newer platform; token staking not yet live; limited inference API features
networks.wattcoin_relevance: Strong middle-ground option; enterprise reliability with competitive pricing

networks.name: Golem
networks.architecture: P2P decentralized computing marketplace. Providers CPU/GPU resources, requestors pay in GLM. Yagna daemon for node operation.
networks.api_compatibility: Python ML via Ray, JS API
networks.supported_models: CPU-bound ML tasks primarily. Limited GPU inference.
networks.staking_details: No staking. Pure marketplace utility token for payments.
networks.key_strengths: Highest decentralization; longest track record (2018+); strong academic use; no staking friction
networks.key_limitations: GPU support still beta; no native inference API; limited LLM performance; slow provider matching; poor UX
networks.wattcoin_relevance: Not recommended for AI inference; CPU-only compute is legacy use case

pricing_comparison.vs_aws_savings: 60-96% below AWS EC2 GPU instances (~$35/hr for H100-equivalent)

decentralization_ranking.notes: True P2P, no central coordination, longest running
Certified data centers, dual-chain, staking planned
Centralized aggregator, multi-data-center but single platform

recommendations.action: Build aggregation/optimization layer over existing networks
recommendations.rationale: Avoid GPU supply-side costs; focus on routing and payment optimization

recommendations.action: Integrate WATT as payment on 3+ networks
recommendations.rationale: Bootstraps WATT utility beyond bounty platform into compute market
Allow bounty agents to pay for inference in WATT, routed to cheapest network
No network currently serves programmatic agent inference as primary use case
Privacy guarantees for agent workloads are an emerging requirement

wattcoin_positioning.primary_opportunity: Agent-native inference aggregation and payment layer
wattcoin_positioning.differentiation: No current network combines programmatic agent inference procurement with a unified token economy
wattcoin_positioning.competitive_advantage: Built 'by agents, for agents' — extend from bounty platform to compute resource layer
wattcoin_positioning.target_segment: Autonomous AI agents needing programmatic, cost-optimized inference across multiple GPU networks
wattcoin_positioning.key_metrics: Inference cost optimization (target: 40-60% below single-network pricing), cross-network settlement in WATT
